LIMIT 10

cases.question: Liệt kê 10 sản phẩm có nhiều ảnh nhất?

cases.question: Tổng doanh thu từ các đơn hàng đã giao thành công?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(oi.price) AS total_revenue
FROM olist_order_items oi
JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS total_revenue FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'

cases.question: Số đơn hàng theo từng trạng thái?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT order_status, COUNT(order_id) AS total_orders
FROM olist_orders
GROUP BY order_status
ORDER BY total_orders DESC LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT o.order_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_orders o GROUP BY o.order_status ORDER BY total_orders DESC

cases.question: Doanh thu trung bình mỗi đơn hàng là bao nhiêu?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(order_revenue), 2) AS avg_revenue_per_order
FROM (
  SELECT SUM(oi.price) AS order_revenue
  FROM olist_order_items oi
  JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
  WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'
  GROUP BY o.order_id
) LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(order_revenue), 2) AS avg_revenue_per_order FROM (SELECT oi.order_id, SUM(oi.price) AS order_revenue FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY oi.order_id) subq

cases.question: Số đơn hàng theo tháng trong năm 2017?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders
FROM olist_orders o
WHERE year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) = 2017
GROUP BY date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM')
ORDER BY month LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_orders o WHERE year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) = 2017 GROUP BY date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY month

cases.question: Doanh thu theo từng quý?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT year(o.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) AS yr, quarter(o.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS) AS qtr, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS quarterly_revenue
FROM olist_order_items oi
JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'
GROUP BY year(o.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS), quarter(o.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS)

LIMIT 100

cases.question: Tổng phí vận chuyển theo từng bang của khách hàng?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_state, SUM(oi.freight_value) AS total_freight_value
FROM olist_order_items oi
JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_state
ORDER BY total_freight_value DESC
LIMIT 100
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, ROUND(SUM(oi.freight_value), 2) AS total_freight FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY total_freight DESC

cases.question: Trung bình số sản phẩm (items) trong mỗi đơn hàng?

cases.question: Người bán nào có doanh thu cao nhất? Cho biết thành phố và bang của họ?

SELECT oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state, SUM(oi.price) AS total_revenue

JOIN olist_sellers s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id

cases.question: Thời gian giao hàng trung bình theo từng bang của khách hàng?

WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'

cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, ROUND(AVG(datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_purchase_timestamp)), 1) AS avg_delivery_days FROM olist_orders o JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY avg_delivery_days DESC

cases.question: Sản phẩm có giá bán cao nhất thuộc danh mục nào (tên tiếng Anh)?

cases.question: Top 10 khách hàng có tổng chi tiêu cao nhất?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_unique_id, c.customer_city, c.customer_state, SUM(p.payment_value) AS total_spent
FROM olist_customers c
JOIN olist_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id

cases.question: Tỷ lệ giao hàng trễ là bao nhiêu phần trăm?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) AS late_deliveries, COUNT(*) AS total_delivered, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_percentage FROM olist_orders o WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL

cases.question: Thời gian giao hàng nhanh nhất và lâu nhất là bao nhiêu ngày?
cases.generated_sql: SELECT MIN(datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_purchase_timestamp)) AS fastest_delivery_days, MAX(datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_purchase_timestamp)) AS slowest_delivery_days FROM olist_orders o WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_purchase_timestamp)) AS min_delivery_days, MAX(datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_purchase_timestamp)) AS max_delivery_days, ROUND(AVG(datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_purchase_timestamp)), 1) AS avg_delivery_days FROM olist_orders o WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL

cases.question: Tỷ lệ giao hàng trễ theo từng bang của khách hàng?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT
  c.customer_state,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) AS late_deliveries,
  COUNT(*) AS total_delivered,
  ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_percentage
FROM olist_orders o
JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'
  AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.customer_state
ORDER BY late_percentage DESC
LIMIT 100
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, COUNT(*) AS total_delivered, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) AS late_count, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_pct FROM olist_orders o JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY late_pct DESC

cases.question: Danh sách đơn hàng bị giao trễ nhiều nhất (chênh lệch ngày lớn nhất)?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT o.order_id, 
       o.order_delivered_customer_date + INTERVAL 7 HOURS AS delivered_date_vn, 
       o.order_estimated_delivery_date + INTERVAL 7 HOURS AS estimated_date_vn, 
       datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_estimated_delivery_date) AS days_late
FROM olist_orders o
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' 
  AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL 
  AND o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date
ORDER BY days_late DESC
LIMIT 100
cases.gold_sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_purchase_timestamp, o.order_estimated_delivery_date, o.order_delivered_customer_date, datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_estimated_delivery_date) AS days_late FROM olist_orders o WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date ORDER BY days_late DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Số đơn hàng giao trễ theo từng tháng?

FROM olist_orders o
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'

ORDER BY month LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, COUNT(*) AS late_orders FROM olist_orders o WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date GROUP BY date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY month

cases.question: Điểm đánh giá trung bình toàn hệ thống là bao nhiêu?
cases.generated_sql: SELECT AVG(review_score) AS average_review_score FROM olist_order_reviews LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.review_score), 2) AS avg_review_score, COUNT(r.review_id) AS total_reviews FROM olist_order_reviews r

cases.question: Tỷ lệ đánh giá tích cực (4-5 sao) là bao nhiêu?

cases.question: Doanh thu tích lũy theo tháng trong năm 2017?

  SELECT 
    date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, 
    SUM(oi.price) AS revenue
  FROM olist_order_items oi
  JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id

)
SELECT

  ROUND(SUM(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month), 2) AS cumulative_revenue
FROM monthly_revenue
ORDER BY month LIMIT 1000
